# Leading BOM above. Blank lines, a stray line with no colon, an unknown
# directive, mixed case fields, and an empty Disallow, which restricts nothing.

USER-AGENT: *
Disallow:

this line has no colon and must be ignored
Host: example.com
Request-rate: 1/10s

  Allow:   /

User-agent:
Disallow: /orphaned-value-with-no-agent
